question_np: Nepal मा अनलाइन ठगीको सबैभन्दा बढी report हुने category कुन हो?
explanation_np: Nepal Police को data अनुसार Foreign Employment Fraud सबैभन्दा बढी report हुने ठगी हो।

question_np: eSewa account hack भएमा तुरुन्त के गर्ने?
options_np: eSewa: 16600172222 मा call गरेर account block गर्ने
explanation_np: eSewa customer care: 16600172222 मा तुरुन्त call गरेर account block र transaction dispute।

question_np: Khalti account safe राख्न के गर्ने?
explanation_np: Strong PIN, 2FA on, transaction alerts on, र suspicious activity monitor गर्नुस्।

question_np: Mobile banking app को PIN कति digit हुनुपर्छ?
explanation_np: Mobile banking PIN minimum 6 digit राख्नुस्। Birthday, phone number use नगर्नुस्।

question_np: ATM card skimming भनेको के हो?
options_np: ATM मा fake device राखेर card data चोर्ने
explanation_np: Card skimming = ATM मा fake card reader राखेर card data copy गर्ने। ATM use गर्नु अघि card slot check।

question_np: ATM use गर्दा PIN enter गर्दा के गर्ने?
options_np: Hand ले keypad cover गरेर type गर्ने
explanation_np: PIN enter गर्दा सधैं hand ले keypad cover गर्नुस् — hidden camera र shoulder surfing बाट बच्न।

question_np: Suspicious ATM machine identify गर्न के हेर्ने?
options_np: Card slot र keypad — loose, extra attachments, hidden cameras
explanation_np: Card slot मा extra device, loose keypad, suspicious holes/cameras — यी skimming signs। अर्को ATM use गर्नुस्।

question_np: Nepal मा contactless payment safe छ?
options_np: NFC technology secure छ — but transaction limit set गर्नुस्
explanation_np: NFC contactless payment secure छ — तर transaction limit set गर्नुस् र card physically secure राख्नुस्।

question_np: Bank statement regularly check गर्नु किन जरुरी छ?
explanation_np: Monthly bank statement check गर्नुस् — unauthorized transaction early detect गर्न र dispute file गर्न।

question_np: Cheque fraud भनेको के हो?
explanation_np: Cheque fraud = fake cheque बनाउने वा original cheque alter गर्ने। Cheque accept गर्दा carefully verify।

question_np: Nepal मा anti-money laundering law कुन हो?
explanation_np: Asset Laundering Prevention Act 2008 Nepal मा money laundering र terrorist financing prevent गर्छ।

question_np: Hawala transaction भनेको के हो?
options_np: Informal money transfer system — unregulated, often illegal
explanation_np: Hawala = informal money transfer without physical movement। Nepal मा unregulated — fraud र money laundering risk।

question_np: Remittance fraud भनेको के हो?
options_np: Fake remittance company मार्फत पैसा चोर्ने
explanation_np: Fake remittance companies ले fees लिएर पैसा deliver नगर्ने। NRB licensed remittance मात्र use।

question_np: NRB licensed remittance companies verify गर्न?
explanation_np: NRB: nrb.org.np मा licensed payment system operators र remittance companies को list छ।

question_np: Ponzi scheme र pyramid scheme को फरक के हो?
options_np: Ponzi = investment returns fake, Pyramid = recruitment based
explanation_np: Ponzi: investor लाई fake returns दिने। Pyramid: recruit गर्नुपर्ने। दुवै illegal।

question_np: Microfinance institution safe छ?
options_np: NRB licensed microfinance institutions generally safe
explanation_np: NRB licensed microfinance institutions regulated हुन्छन्। Unlicensed ones avoid गर्नुस्।

question_np: Insurance claim process मा fraud prevent गर्न?
options_np: Original policy document, premium receipts राख्ने, direct company सँग deal
explanation_np: Original policy, premium receipts safe राख्नुस्। Claim directly company मा file गर्नुस् — agent मार्फत होइन।

question_np: Fake bank (shell bank) identify गर्न?
options_np: NRB licensed banks list मा check — nrb.org.np
explanation_np: NRB: nrb.org.np मा licensed commercial banks को official list छ। List मा नभएको bank = fake।

question_np: Deposit guarantee Nepal मा कति छ?
options_np: Deposit Protection Fund ले Rs.5 lakh सम्म guarantee
explanation_np: Nepal को Deposit and Credit Guarantee Corporation ले bank deposits मा limited guarantee दिन्छ।

question_np: Financial advisor छान्दा के check गर्ने?
options_np: SEBON/NRB license, experience, track record, fee structure
explanation_np: Financial advisor: SEBON/NRB license, experience, verified track record, transparent fee structure check।

question_np: Cyber stalking भनेको के हो?
options_np: Online मा किसीलाई repeatedly harass/monitor गर्ने
explanation_np: Cyber stalking = online platforms मार्फत किसीलाई repeatedly harass, monitor, threaten गर्ने। Illegal।

question_np: Cyber bullying भएमा के गर्ने?
options_np: Evidence save गर्ने, report गर्ने, Cyber Bureau: 1177 मा complaint
explanation_np: Evidence (screenshots) save, platform मा report, Cyber Bureau: 1177 मा complaint, र trusted adult लाई भन्नुस्।

question_np: Online hate speech Nepal मा legal छ?
options_np: No — Electronic Transaction Act र Criminal Code अन्तर्गत illegal
explanation_np: Online hate speech Nepal मा ETA र Criminal Code अन्तर्गत illegal। Report गर्न सकिन्छ।

question_np: Screen time addiction र online fraud connection के छ?
options_np: Excessive screen time ले judgment impair गर्छ — fraud vulnerability बढ्छ
explanation_np: Excessive online time ले critical thinking कम हुन्छ — fraudulent offers मा easily fall हुने risk बढ्छ।

question_np: Online gaming fraud भनेको के हो?
options_np: Fake in-game items/currency बेच्ने, account steal गर्ने
explanation_np: Online gaming fraud: fake items/currency बेच्ने, account credentials steal गर्ने, fake tournaments।

question_np: Malware vs Virus को फरक के हो?
options_np: Virus = malware को एक type, malware = all malicious software
explanation_np: Malware = malicious software (umbrella term)। Virus, ransomware, spyware, trojan — सबै malware का types।

question_np: Spyware भनेको के हो?
options_np: User को knowledge without information collect गर्ने malware
explanation_np: Spyware = secretly user को activities monitor गर्ने, keystrokes record गर्ने malware।

question_np: Trojan horse malware भनेको के हो?
options_np: Legitimate software जस्तो देखिने malicious program
explanation_np: Trojan = legitimate software जस्तो देखिने — install गरेपछि malicious activities गर्छ।

question_np: Zero-day exploit भनेको के हो?
options_np: Unknown vulnerability — patch अझ available छैन
explanation_np: Zero-day = software vulnerability जुन developer लाई थाहा छैन — patch available नहुँदा exploit हुन्छ।

question_np: Endpoint security भनेको के हो?
explanation_np: Endpoint security = individual devices (computers, phones, tablets) लाई malware र attacks बाट protect।

question_np: Nepal मा police को hierarchy कस्तो छ?
options_np: IGP → AIGP → DIG → SSP → SP → DSP
explanation_np: Nepal Police hierarchy: IGP → AIGP → DIG → SSP → SP → DSP → Inspector → Sub-Inspector।

question_np: CIB (Criminal Investigation Bureau) के गर्छ?
options_np: Serious crimes investigate गर्छ — fraud, trafficking, organized crime
explanation_np: CIB = serious crimes (murder, trafficking, organized fraud) investigate गर्छ। Contact: 01-4412548।

question_np: INTERPOL भनेको के हो?
options_np: International Criminal Police Organization — global crime coordination
explanation_np: INTERPOL = International Criminal Police Organization। Global criminal coordination र international arrests।

question_np: FIR दर्ता गर्दा के के document चाहिन्छ?
options_np: Citizenship/ID, incident description, evidence (receipt/screenshot), witness info
explanation_np: FIR को लागि: ID, written incident description, evidence copies, witness information — सबै लिएर जानुस्।

question_np: Police investigation मा cooperate नगरेमा?
options_np: Obstruction of justice — legal consequences हुन सक्छ
explanation_np: Police investigation मा cooperate नगर्नु = obstruction of justice। Nepal Criminal Code अन्तर्गत action।

question_np: Witness को rights के हुन्?
options_np: Protection, anonymity (certain cases), fair treatment, no self-incrimination
explanation_np: Witnesses लाई: protection, fair treatment, र certain cases मा anonymity को rights छन्।

question_np: Bail भनेको के हो?
options_np: Temporary release from custody with conditions/security
explanation_np: Bail = conditions (financial/personal guarantee) मा custody बाट temporary release। Trial continue हुन्छ।

question_np: Remand भनेको के हो?
options_np: Investigation को लागि custody मा राख्ने court order
explanation_np: Remand = police investigation को लागि suspect लाई court order अनुसार custody मा राख्ने।

question_np: Plea bargaining Nepal मा छ?
options_np: Yes — Criminal Procedure Code अन्तर्गत certain cases मा available
explanation_np: Nepal मा plea bargaining provisions छन् — accused ले guilty plea गरेर reduced sentence पाउन सक्छ।

question_np: Acquittal भनेको के हो?
options_np: Court ले not guilty भनी release गर्ने
explanation_np: Acquittal = court ले accused लाई not guilty declare गरेर release गर्ने।

question_np: Marriage registration किन गर्नुपर्छ?
options_np: Legal rights protect गर्न — property, inheritance, children rights
explanation_np: Marriage registration ले spouse को property rights, inheritance, र children को legal rights protect गर्छ।

question_np: Domestic violence भएमा कहाँ जाने?
options_np: Police: 100, महिला आयोग: 1145, safe house — तुरुन्त
explanation_np: Domestic violence: Police: 100, महिला आयोग: 1145, safe house request। Immediate safety priority।

question_np: Child marriage Nepal मा legal हो?
explanation_np: Nepal मा legal marriage age: 20 years (both). Child marriage illegal — punishment हुन्छ।

question_np: Child labor Nepal मा legal हो?
options_np: No — 14 years minimum for light work, hazardous work banned
explanation_np: Nepal मा 14 years minimum age for light work। Hazardous/dangerous work for anyone under 18 banned।

question_np: Adoption fraud कसरी बच्ने?
options_np: Legal agencies मात्र, court process follow, all documents verify
explanation_np: Legal adoption agencies, court approved process, र Ministry of Women/Children verification।

question_np: Elder abuse भनेको के हो?
options_np: Elderly person को physical, financial, emotional abuse
explanation_np: Elder abuse = elderly को physical harm, financial exploitation, emotional/psychological abuse।

question_np: बुढापाका आफन्तलाई fraud बाट बचाउन के गर्ने?
options_np: Digital literacy सिकाउने, suspicious calls/messages बारे inform गर्ने, monitor गर्ने
explanation_np: बुढापाकालाई: basic digital literacy, common fraud patterns सिकाउने, र suspicious activities बारे regularly check।

question_np: Scam awareness program कहाँ पाइन्छ Nepal मा?
options_np: Nepal Police, Cyber Bureau, Consumer Forum मा — online पनि available
explanation_np: Nepal Police, Cyber Bureau, Consumer Forum — सबैले awareness programs run गर्छन्। Online resources पनि।

question_np: Community fraud watch program के हो?
options_np: Community members collectively fraud activities monitor गर्ने र report गर्ने
explanation_np: Community watch = neighborhood/community मा fraud activities collectively monitor र report — crime prevention।

question_np: Fraud prevention मा social media को role के हो?
options_np: Awareness spread गर्न effective — viral warnings, education
explanation_np: Social media ले fraud awareness rapidly spread गर्न सक्छ। Verified information share गर्नुस्।

question_np: Charity scam identify गर्न के check गर्ने?
options_np: Registration, bank account type, transparency, track record
explanation_np: Charity verify: SWC registration, institutional bank account, annual report, past work transparency।

question_np: Disaster relief fraud कसरी avoid गर्ने?
options_np: Government relief funds वा verified INGOs मार्फत मात्र donate
explanation_np: PM Relief Fund, Nepal Red Cross, UNICEF Nepal — verified channels मार्फत मात्र donate।

question_np: Fund crowdfunding platform safe छ Nepal मा?
options_np: Platform verify गर्ने, campaign organizer verify गर्ने, payment method check
explanation_np: Crowdfunding: platform reputation, organizer identity, fund usage transparency verify गर्नुस्।

question_np: Volunteering scam भनेको के हो?
options_np: Fake volunteer programs ले fees लिएर fraudulent activities गर्ने
explanation_np: Fake volunteer programs: high fees, poor/no actual work, credential misuse। Verified organizations मात्र।

question_np: Micro-lending scam identify गर्न?
options_np: NRB license, clear terms, no upfront fees, transparent process
explanation_np: Legitimate micro-lending: NRB licensed, clear terms, no advance fees, transparent repayment schedule।

question_np: Agricultural fraud Nepal मा common कुन हो?
options_np: Fake seeds/fertilizers, fake subsidy agents, fake loan schemes
explanation_np: Agricultural fraud: fake seeds/fertilizers, fake subsidy middlemen, illegal moneylending to farmers।

question_np: Tractor/equipment loan fraud avoid गर्न?
options_np: NRB licensed bank/cooperative मार्फत, clear contract, delivery verification
explanation_np: Equipment loan: NRB licensed institution, clear contract (delivery conditions), equipment verify after delivery।

question_np: Organic certification fraud Nepal मा?
options_np: Fake organic labels बेच्ने — certification body verify गर्ने
explanation_np: Organic certification verify गर्न: NARC वा authorized certification bodies बाट issued certificate check।

question_np: Irrigation project fraud कसरी report गर्ने?
options_np: CIAA: 1113, Department of Irrigation, local police
explanation_np: Irrigation fund misuse: CIAA: 1113 र Department of Irrigation मा complaint दिनुस्।

question_np: Water scarcity fraud भनेको के हो?
options_np: Water scarcity time मा fake water supply services, overcharging
explanation_np: Water crisis मा fake tankers, overcharging, contaminated water supply — consumer protection laws apply।

question_np: Tourism fraud Nepal मा common कुन हो?
options_np: Fake trekking agencies, guide scams, tourist overcharging
explanation_np: Tourism fraud: unlicensed agencies, fake guides, overcharging tourists, fake permits।

question_np: Nepal Tourism Board registered agency verify गर्न?
options_np: ntb.gov.np मा registered agencies list check
explanation_np: Nepal Tourism Board: ntb.gov.np मा registered trekking/tourism agencies verify गर्न सकिन्छ।

question_np: Trekking permit fraud avoid गर्न?
options_np: Official government offices बाट directly permits किन्ने
explanation_np: Trekking permits: TIMS — Nepal Tourism Board, ACAP/NATT permits — directly official offices बाट।

question_np: Hotel/restaurant fraud avoid गर्न?
options_np: Menu prices verify, bill carefully check, receipt लिने
explanation_np: Restaurant: menu prices display confirm, bill itemize check, receipt लिनुस्। Overcharging common।

question_np: Fake travel insurance बेच्छु भन्यो। के गर्ने?
options_np: Beema Samiti registered insurance company बाट direct किन्ने
explanation_np: Travel insurance: Beema Samiti registered company बाट direct। Agent ले बेच्ने भए agent license verify।

question_np: Currency exchange fraud Nepal मा?
options_np: Unauthorized money changers, fake notes, wrong rates — NRB licensed changers मात्र
explanation_np: Currency exchange: NRB licensed money changers मात्र use गर्नुस्। Rate, notes verify गर्नुस्।

question_np: Fake Nepal currency notes identify गर्न?
options_np: Watermark, security thread, feel of paper check गर्ने
explanation_np: Real currency: watermark (light मा देखिन्छ), security thread, special paper feel, color shifting ink।

question_np: Counterfeit currency report गर्न?
options_np: Nepal Rastra Bank र Nepal Police मा immediately report
explanation_np: Counterfeit currency: तुरुन्त NRB र Nepal Police मा report। Spend गर्नु illegal।

question_np: Airport fraud Nepal मा common कुन हो?
options_np: Fake porters, overcharging taxis, fake customs clearance agents
explanation_np: Airport fraud: unauthorized porters, unlicensed taxis, fake customs agents। Official services मात्र use।

question_np: Fake tour guide identify गर्न?
options_np: Nepal Tourism Board issued guide license check गर्ने
explanation_np: Licensed tour guides को NTB issued guide license हुन्छ। License number verify गर्नुस्।

question_np: Import/export fraud Nepal मा कसरी हुन्छ?
explanation_np: Trade fraud: fake quality certificates, invoice manipulation, smuggling। Customs department vigilant हुन्छ।

question_np: Intellectual property theft Nepal मा legal action?
options_np: Copyright Act, Patent Act, Trademark Act अन्तर्गत action लिन सकिन्छ
explanation_np: Nepal मा Copyright Act 2002, Patent Act, Trademark Act — IP theft मा legal action।

question_np: Pirated software use गर्नु?
options_np: Illegal — malware risk पनि छ, legal action हुन सक्छ
explanation_np: Pirated software: copyright violation + malware risk। Legal software use गर्नुस् वा open-source alternatives।

question_np: Nepal मा data privacy law छ?
options_np: Individual Privacy Act 2018 — personal data protection
explanation_np: Nepal को Individual Privacy Act 2018 ले personal data collection, use, sharing regulate गर्छ।

question_np: GDPR Nepal मा apply हुन्छ?
options_np: Not directly — तर European users को data handle गर्ने Nepal companies लाई apply
explanation_np: GDPR EU law हो। European citizens को data process गर्ने Nepal companies मा indirectly apply।

question_np: Right to be forgotten भनेको के हो?
options_np: Online बाट आफ्नो personal data remove गर्न request गर्ने अधिकार
explanation_np: Right to be forgotten = individuals लाई outdated/irrelevant personal data online बाट remove request गर्ने अधिकार।

question_np: Consent in data collection भनेको के हो?
options_np: User को explicit permission बिना data collect गर्नु illegal
explanation_np: Informed consent = user लाई clearly explain गरेर permission लिनुपर्छ। बिना consent data collection illegal।

question_np: Nepal मा e-commerce regulation?
options_np: Electronic Transaction Act र Department of Commerce regulate गर्छ
explanation_np: E-commerce: Electronic Transaction Act 2063 र DoC regulate। Consumer protection provisions included।

question_np: Digital signature Nepal मा valid छ?
options_np: Yes — Electronic Transaction Act 2063 अन्तर्गत legally valid
explanation_np: Nepal मा digital signatures ETA 2063 अन्तर्गत legally valid। Electronic contracts enforceable।

question_np: Blockchain technology fraud prevention मा use हुन्छ?
options_np: Yes — immutable records, transparency ले fraud reduce गर्छ
explanation_np: Blockchain: immutable transaction records, transparency — supply chain, voting, financial transactions मा fraud reduce।

question_np: Nepal को National Cyber Security Policy छ?
options_np: Yes — government ले cyber security framework develop गरेको छ
explanation_np: Nepal को National Cyber Security Policy र Information Technology Policy छ।

question_np: CERT Nepal भनेको के हो?
options_np: Computer Emergency Response Team — cyber incidents respond गर्छ
explanation_np: CERT Nepal = Computer Emergency Response Team। Cyber incidents, vulnerabilities report र response।

question_np: Bug bounty program भनेको के हो?
options_np: Companies ले security researchers लाई vulnerability find गर्दा reward दिने
explanation_np: Bug bounty = companies ले ethical hackers लाई security vulnerabilities responsibly disclose गर्दा reward।

question_np: Penetration testing भनेको के हो?
options_np: Authorized security testing — vulnerabilities find गर्न
explanation_np: Penetration testing = authorized security professional ले system vulnerabilities find गर्ने legitimate security practice।

question_np: Social engineering attack भनेको के हो?
options_np: Technical hack होइन — human psychology manipulate गरेर information extract
explanation_np: Social engineering = technical hack नभई human psychology (trust, fear, urgency) manipulate गरेर information।

question_np: Pretexting भनेको के हो?
options_np: Fake scenario create गरेर information extract गर्ने social engineering
explanation_np: Pretexting = fake identity/scenario create गरेर (e.g., 'म IT support हुँ') information extract।

question_np: Tailgating (piggybacking) security breach भनेको के हो?
options_np: Authorized person पछि secure area मा enter गर्ने
explanation_np: Tailgating = authorized person को पछि physically secure area (office, server room) मा enter गर्ने।

question_np: Dumpster diving attack भनेको के हो?
options_np: Discarded documents बाट sensitive information extract
explanation_np: Dumpster diving = thrown away documents (bank statements, receipts) बाट sensitive information collect।

question_np: Shoulder surfing attack prevent गर्न?
options_np: Screen privacy filter, public मा sensitive info avoid, body positioning
explanation_np: Shoulder surfing prevent: privacy screen filter use, public मा passwords/PINs input गर्दा body position।

question_np: Watering hole attack भनेको के हो?
options_np: Target group ले commonly visit गर्ने website compromise गर्ने
explanation_np: Watering hole = target group ले frequently visit गर्ने legitimate website hack गरेर malware spread।

question_np: Nepal को judiciary structure कस्तो छ?
options_np: Supreme Court → High Court → District Court
explanation_np: Nepal judiciary: Supreme Court (top) → High Court (appellate) → District Court (trial)।

question_np: Arbitration भनेको के हो?
options_np: Neutral third party ले binding decision दिने dispute resolution
explanation_np: Arbitration = neutral arbitrator ले binding decision दिने — court भन्दा faster, less formal।

question_np: Small claims court Nepal मा छ?
options_np: District Court मा small claims handle हुन्छ
explanation_np: Nepal मा District Court मा small civil claims file गर्न सकिन्छ।

question_np: Civil vs Criminal case को फरक के हो?
options_np: Civil = private disputes, Criminal = state vs accused
explanation_np: Civil = individual vs individual (money, property)। Criminal = state vs accused (crime punishment)।

question_np: Burden of proof criminal case मा कसमा हुन्छ?
explanation_np: Criminal case मा prosecution ले beyond reasonable doubt prove गर्नुपर्छ। Innocent until proven guilty।

question_np: Appeal गर्न सकिन्छ court decision मा?
options_np: Yes — District → High Court → Supreme Court
explanation_np: Nepal मा court hierarchy: District Court decision → High Court appeal → Supreme Court final appeal।

question_np: Contempt of court भनेको के हो?
options_np: Court को authority disrespect गर्ने — imprisonment हुन सक्छ
explanation_np: Contempt of court = court orders violate गर्ने, court लाई disrespect गर्ने। Punishment: fine/imprisonment।

question_np: Habeas corpus भनेको के हो?
options_np: Illegal detention challenge गर्ने court writ
explanation_np: Habeas corpus = illegal detention challenge गर्ने fundamental right। Court ले detention review गर्छ।

question_np: Injunction भनेको के हो?
options_np: Court order — कुनै action stop गर्न वा continue गर्न
explanation_np: Injunction = court order जसले कुनै action temporarily stop (restraining) वा continue (mandatory) गर्न force।

question_np: Nepal मा consumer rights के के हुन्?
options_np: Safe products, accurate information, fair price, redress — Consumer Protection Act
explanation_np: Consumer rights: safe products, truthful information, fair pricing, redress mechanism — Consumer Protection Act।
